daily.today_energy: The cosmic vibes are giving introspective energy, Pisces. Today's a gentle reminder to trust your gut feelings—they're basically your superpower rn. Channel that dreamy intuition into something real.
daily.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language today. Stop overthinking that text or conversation—just be yourself. The right people vibe with the real you, no filter needed.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. Don't sleep on that project idea you've been sitting with. Someone influential might actually be paying attention, so bring your A-game and share your vision.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for some TLC. Take breaks, hydrate, and maybe do something that feels like a warm hug—yoga, tea, journaling, whatever grounds you. Your mental health is just as important as your hustle.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dance this week is giving you clarity you've been craving. Trust the whispers of your intuition—they're leading you somewhere real. Let go of what doesn't resonate anymore and make space for something fresher.
weekly.love: Venus is softening your edges in the sweetest way. Whether you're single or coupled up, this is your moment to be vulnerable without fear. Someone's noticing your glow. Allow yourself to be seen.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different right now. Don't sleep on that project you've been workshopping—pitch it or start it. Professional recognition is closer than you think if you take action this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness, not punishment. Lean into restorative activities—stretching, journaling, long showers. Rest isn't laziness; it's how you recharge your mystical batteries. Listen to what feels nourishing.
